race.description: Courtney Keeffe Elders Real Estate Maiden
race.comment: ALLA PING (9) improved again beaten 2.4L this track/trip. Has been freshened and the winkers go on for the first time. Maps well and Faithfull is a positive jockey engagement. COSTA STAR (7) peaks and in a weak Maiden and she gets another chance. Gives away starts, but she gets a handy 2kg claim today, and her best efforts would see her in the finish. SWISHGOBANGO (4) was plain last time but has two key gear additions today and they may help. Drops back 280m and is on a 9-day return. LOONA DAWN (8) is a leader who showed enough two back over this trip to consider. Draws to advantage and will give a sight. WITHOUT A PADDLE (10) debuts and has been well educated. A betting watch.
